title: oωo velocity plugin
description: Velocity plugin for oωo handshake support
body: *** This proxy plugin fixes the oωo-lib handshake on Velocity by properly relaying the relevant packets to the client. If you somehow found this plugin and are not using Velocity, refer to [the documentation](https://docs.wispforest.io/owo/system-properties/#-dowohandshakedisable-truefalse) in order to properly disable handshaking - this presents a different mitigation for this issue
